name: Background Studio
description: Use a picture or GIF as the LiquidDrop background while preserving readable glass panels and contrast.
author: LiquidDrop

settings_schema.label: Image or GIF
settings_schema.help: Choose the background media used behind LiquidDrop.

settings_schema.label: Readability veil
settings_schema.help: Higher values make text easier to read over bright images.

settings_schema.label: Background blur
settings_schema.help: Softens busy photos and animated GIFs behind the UI.

settings_schema.label: Tint color
settings_schema.help: Color used for the readability veil.
